message:
feat(protocol): add output_schema field to Tool definition

Extend Tool struct with optional output_schema field:
- types.rs: Add output_schema: Option<serde_json::Value> to Tool
- messages.rs: Update tool serialization to include output_schema
- handlers.rs: Wire through output_schema in console display
- proxy.rs: Pass output_schema in proxy responses
- transform.rs: Handle output_schema in transforms
- bench.rs: Update benchmark tool definitions

Update all test fixtures to include output_schema: None for existing tools

The output_schema field enables MCP tools to declare their response
structure, improving client-side type checking and documentation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
